calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petitioner was sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Petitioner: Stephen Earl Driggs appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock of Legal Assistance to the Elderly.

Respondent: Jesse Driggs was not present.

Petitioner was sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person's Residence and the Building located at 559 Valencia Street, San Francisco.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements of the Protected Persons.

Expires August 18, 2011.

Order signed in open court.
